title: Systems & Product Engineering
subtitle: About
description: Sailesh Iyyappan Jr. is a Systems Product Engineer and Technical Founder focused on building patent-oriented products and intelligent technology systems by combining embedded hardware, IoT, AI-assisted software, and applied research. His work spans wearable health technology, engineering collaboration platforms, embedded systems, product prototyping, and innovation-driven system design. He focuses on designing complete technology systems from concept and architecture through development, testing, documentation, and product validation.

focusAreas.title: Product Engineering
focusAreas.description: Designing and building complete products from concept through prototyping, testing, validation, and deployment.

focusAreas.title: Embedded Systems
focusAreas.description: Developing embedded hardware and firmware using ESP32 platforms, sensors, communication modules, and peripheral interfaces.

focusAreas.title: Internet of Things (IoT)
focusAreas.description: Building connected embedded systems using BLE, Wi-Fi, GSM, GPS, and cloud-ready communication architectures.

focusAreas.title: System Architecture
focusAreas.description: Designing complete engineering ecosystems by integrating embedded hardware, firmware, software, mobile applications, and modular workflows.

focusAreas.title: AI-Assisted Systems
focusAreas.description: Exploring AI-assisted software, intelligent workflows, engineering automation, and machine learning integration into real-world products.

focusAreas.title: Research Engineering
focusAreas.description: Conducting engineering research through literature review, experimentation, technical validation, documentation, and publication preparation.

focusAreas.title: Patent-Oriented Development
focusAreas.description: Developing innovative engineering concepts with potential intellectual property value through technical design, documentation, and invention-oriented product development.

focusAreas.title: Full Stack Platforms
focusAreas.description: Developing engineering software platforms, dashboards, APIs, and web applications that complement embedded hardware systems.
